testcase.name: setUp

failure.message:
Mockito cannot mock this class: interface braces.dao.TaiKhoanDAO.
If you're not sure why you're getting this error, please open an issue on GitHub.
Java : 23 JVM vendor name : Amazon.com Inc. JVM vendor version : 23.0.2+7-FR JVM name : OpenJDK 64-Bit Server VM JVM version : 23.0.2+7-FR JVM info : mixed mode, sharing OS name : Windows 11 OS version : 10.0
You are seeing this disclaimer because Mockito is configured to create inlined mocks. You can learn about inline mocks and their limitations under item #39 of the Mockito class javadoc.
